chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4246 of 2025. ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.17491/2025 2. For order on office objection No.1 to 7 3. For order on Misc. No.17492/2025 4. For hearing of main case 09.09.2025 Mr. Mian Haad A.M Paggawala, advocate for the petitioner --------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2. Overruled. 3-4. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that FIR No.210/2025 under Sections 506-B/337-A(i) at PS Gulshan-e-Iqbal, District East, Karachi, has been lodged against the petitioner. No grounds have been made out for quashment of such FIR. The petitioner shall join the inquiry. I.O of the said FIR shall conduct inquiry impartially and in accordance with the law. A copy of this order shall be sent to the I.O of FIR No.210/2025 registered at PS Gulshan-e-Iqbal, as well as SSP District East Karachi, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
